title: tanacetum walteri
intro: Tanacetum walteri, also known as Tansy Ragwort, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of Tanacetum walteri include its ability to relieve symptoms of digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antihistamine. Tanacetum walteri is often prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, and can also be used in herbal remedies, such as salves and poultices, to treat various health conditions.
